title: psilocaulon granulicaule
side_effects: Psilocaulon granulicaule can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and dizziness, which can be caused by an overload of tryptamine, a key psychoactive compound found in the plant. Prolonged use can also lead to anxiety, paranoia, and hallucinations that can be disorienting and uncomfortable. In extreme cases, misuse of the plant can result in psychotic episodes, which can be a serious health concern and may require medical attention. It is essential to note that Psilocaulon granulicaule should be handled and used with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
